caption: MacBook Pro M4 review: the pro laptop to beat — 9.2/10. Silent, blistering M4 Pro performance, a stunning 1600-nit display and a 24-hour battery. And it holds its value better than almost anything. Check yours at purchasingcorp.com
Parents: GTA 6 is THE gift every kid will ask for — but a console plus the game adds up fast. The old phones and tablets around the house can knock $300 off. Gift smarter at purchasingcorp.com
Trading your old console for store credit before GTA 6 is a trap. Credit locks you into one store — cash spends anywhere, and usually beats the credit anyway. Get a cash offer at purchasingcorp.com
